title: Exclude date column from My Work
excerpt: I have date columns in various boards that are not Due Dates (I.e. they illustrate the date the item was escalated). I know I can customize my own personal My Work view to not look at those columns specifically, but it’s…

posts.author: charlie.bauer (Charlie Bauer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have date columns in various boards that are not Due Dates (I.e. they illustrate the date the item was escalated). I know I can customize my own personal My Work view to not look at those columns specifically, but it’s not scalable for me to get everyone at my company with access to the board to do that.

I’d like a way to tell Monday.com that a Date column is not a Due Date (and thus not eligible as a default in My Work).
